final.title: Be part of transforming education across Africa

hero.title: About Santos Creations Educational Foundation (SCEF)
hero.subtitle: SCEF is a pan-African membership-driven NGO advancing Education for All through impact programs, local chapters, media advocacy, trusted certifications, and CSR partnerships.

who.title: Who We Are
who.body: SCEF builds a connected education ecosystem — with layered governance, integrated programs, and a membership model — to improve access, quality, inclusion, and measurable impact across Africa and the diaspora.

objectives.title: Our 6 Objectives
items: Establish multi-layer governance for education delivery.
Deploy digital platforms for access and certification.
Onboard and track local chapters for compliance.
Secure funding and partnerships with accountability.
Align operations to UN SDGs and AU Agenda 2063 for scalability.

history.title: Our History
history.body: SCEF has evolved over time into a pan-African membership-driven platform — supporting education systems through programs, media, local chapters, and accountable partnerships.

vision.title: Vision 2035
vision.body: By 2035, SCEF aims to support a continuously improving education standard across Africa — strengthening chapter action, inclusion, trusted certification, and ethical funding with credible impact reporting.

sustainability.title: Sustainability, SDGs & Agenda 2063
sustainability.body: SCEF designs programs for measurable social impact, long-term transparency, and genuine inclusion — aligned with SDG 4, related SDGs, and the African Union's Agenda 2063.
sustainability.csrFundsBody: We help partners structure, deploy, and track CSR funds for education — with governance, execution oversight, and impact reporting.

programs.title: Our 6 Programs
programs.intro: SCEF delivers impact through six flagship programs designed to work together on access, quality, inclusion, skills, and recognition.

cards.nesa: New Education Standard Award Africa (NESA Africa) — Recognizing and amplifying educational excellence.
cards.eduaid: Education Aid Africa (EduAid Africa) — Scholarships, support pathways, and education funding.
cards.rmsa: Rebuild My School Africa (RMSA) — School renewal and learning environment improvement.
cards.eoa: Education Online Africa (EOA) — Digital learning and verifiable certification.
cards.womenGirls: Women & Girls Education — Targeted interventions for access and outcomes.
cards.specialNeeds: Special Needs Education Support — Inclusion and support for learners.

eoaSpotlight.title: Education Online Africa (EOA): Learn. Get Certified. Renew.
eoaSpotlight.body: EOA helps learners build practical skills, earn verifiable credentials, and renew every 24 months. Pathways include ACDL and AWPC, plus an exam portal with integrity controls.

items.exec: Governance & Executive Office — Executive Secretary (Legal & Governance) + PRO
items.sobcd: SOBCD — Admin, HR, finance oversight, events, training, compliance
items.tdsd: TDSD — Web/App, CMS, database, security, analytics, wallet-ready systems
items.ombdd: OMBDD — Fundraising comms, sponsors, growth, partnership pipeline
items.lcs: Local Chapter Services Division (LCS) — Activation, support, governance, reporting

trust.title: Governance & Trust
trust.body: SCEF maintains structured governance and accountability through boards, policies, and transparent impact reporting.

final.title: Join the transformation of education in Africa

footer.mission: Governing Africa's Education Future through advocacy, funding, and certification of educational excellence across the continent.
